description_long: This is a structured, trapezoidal handbag with a woven yellow body and sturdy wooden handles. The front and back surfaces are adorned with intricate black floral lace appliqué, adding a decorative and elegant touch. The handles are short, wide, and ergonomically shaped, made from a polished wood material, and attached to the bag with black hardware. A small metallic brand logo plate reading 'CheChe' is affixed to the upper center of both the front and back sides. The bag appears to have a semi-rigid structure, likely reinforced for shape retention, and the woven texture gives it a tactile, artisanal feel. The closure mechanism is not fully visible but is likely a magnetic snap or clasp located at the top opening between the handles.
description: A yellow woven handbag with wooden handles, black floral lace appliqué, and a metallic 'CheChe' logo plate. The bag is structured and decorative, with a semi-rigid, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow, triangular profile and the thickness of the woven yellow body, with the wooden handles aligned vertically.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the yellow woven surface, black floral lace appliqué on the left, the metallic 'CheChe' logo plate at the top center, and the full wooden handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the triangular profile and the woven texture, with the handles visible from the side.
description_view_3: Back view showing the yellow woven surface, black floral lace appliqué on the right, the metallic 'CheChe' logo plate at the top center, and the full wooden handle.
attribute_brand_logo: A small metallic plate with the text 'CheChe' is centered near the top of both the front and back sides of the bag.
attribute_strap_type: Single pair of short, rigid wooden handles, non-adjustable, attached with black hardware at the top opening.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Likely a magnetic snap or clasp closure located at the top opening between the handles.
attribute_decorative_elements: Black floral lace appliqué on the front and back surfaces; metallic brand logo plate.
attribute_pattern: Yellow woven base with black floral lace appliqué forming an asymmetric decorative pattern.
